inputs.price_source: [Assumption] Dec 2024 stock option exercise price $1,284/sh (2024-12-31_Annual_Report.pdf Note 10); refresh live OTC quote before accumulate
inputs.shares_source: FY2024 annual report: 34,865 shares issued and outstanding
inputs.fcf_source: FY2024: net cash from operations $2,196,071 minus property purchases $352,259 = $1,843,812 / 34,865 shares
inputs.liquid_assets_note: Cash $0.49M + marketable securities $8.12M + grain inventory $2.59M at Dec 2024 marks
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence base uses operating cash less capital spending, not net income (includes $364K unrealized securities gains in FY2024). Farm rental and oil/gas royalties declined YoY on crop/oil prices.

optionality_gate.floor_value_note: Mark-to-market liquid assets Dec 2024; land carried at historical cost ($2.93M) not fair-value NAV
optionality_gate.notes: Price ~3.2× GAAP book and ~4× liquid-asset floor; no debt; dividend $40/sh below normalized owner cash ~$53/sh but above trough farm/oil cycle earnings power

gaap_vs_fair_value.policy: Property and equipment at historical cost; land and water rights $2,929,945 on Dec 2024 balance sheet

nav_overlay.overlay_nav_note: [Assumption] GAAP book + partial land remark pending acreage from supplemental PDFs (image-only in workspace)
not_in_model_requires_refresh: Acreage and per-acre fair marks from supplemental information PDFs (not text-extracted)
FY2025 annual report (image PDF; OCR pending)
Live OTC Pink quote and daily volume
Oil/gas royalty decline rate by well count

bear.notes: Farm rental and oil/gas stay soft; dividend cut toward $30/sh; securities gains fade

base.notes: Normalized owner cash $52.88/sh; modest crop-cycle recovery; family dividend policy continues

bull.notes: Farm/oil rebound toward 2022 revenue levels; portfolio gains; acreage mark crystallized

growth_explanation.base_mechanism: Crop-share farm income tied to southwest Kansas harvests and commodity prices; oil/gas royalties from third-party wells on owned land; investment portfolio marks add volatility but are excluded from Lawrence owner-cash starting point
growth_explanation.bear_risk: FY2024 farm rental down 7% and oil/gas royalties down 17% vs 2023; postretirement health obligation $1.28M grows with actuarial losses

human_review.notes: Price anchored to Dec 2024 option strike; supplemental acreage PDFs and FY2025 annual need OCR/Vicki. Tutt/Hybl family board control.

catalyst_paths.impact: Farm rental income rebound from FY2024 $4.28M toward FY2022 $6.58M
Price reverts toward liquid-asset floor ~$317/sh if dividends cut and farm/oil stay weak

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
